name: The Sleepless Sphinx
dialogue: Nephren counted you. Anpu weighed you. Setem forged you. Mehet predicted you.
Four trials — four answers. Now there is only the riddle.
What walks on four legs in the morning, two at noon, and asks the desert for permission at dusk?
You. The answer is you. I do not need to hear it.
I have been awake for six thousand years waiting for this fight. Try not to bore me.
preBattleLine: The Sphinx stretches once, slow. The sand under her paws turns to glass.
postDefeatDialogue: The Sphinx settles back onto her paws, yawning.
"The Pharaoh is yours. The Court is yours. The Tomb is yours. I will sleep again now — wake me only if a worthier hand comes through."
She closes her eyes. The desert exhales.
prereqBlockedMessage: The Sphinx's eyes stay closed. "Four trials. Four names. Return when the Court has spoken every one."
